title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security. Click on 'Forgot Password' and follow the email instructions. The reset link expires in 24 hours.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are allowed within 7 days of purchase. To request a refund, go to Orders > Select Order > Request Refund. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days.

title: Delete Account
content: To delete your account, go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be removed within 30 days.

title: Shipping Information
content: We offer free shipping on orders above $50. Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping (2-3 days) is available for an additional fee.

title: Payment Methods
content: We accept credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, Amex), debit cards, PayPal, and Apple Pay. All payments are processed securely through our payment gateway.

title: Contact Support
content: You can reach our support team via email at support@example.com or through the live chat on our website. Support hours are Monday-Friday, 9 AM - 6 PM EST.

title: Track Order
content: To track your order, go to Orders section and click on the order number. You'll see real-time tracking information. You'll also receive tracking updates via email.

title: Change Email Address
content: To change your email address, go to Settings > Account > Email. Enter your new email and verify it through the confirmation link sent to your new email address.

title: Cancel Subscription
content: To cancel your subscription, go to Settings > Subscription > Cancel. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period. No refunds for partial months.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
content: Enable 2FA from Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. You can use SMS or an authenticator app. We highly recommend enabling 2FA for account security.
